element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic combat tool; limited effectiveness teaches early reliance on ranged weapons
Primary combat tools; found progressively throughout levels
Secondary firing mode amplifier; transforms weapon behavior and projectile appearance

element_introduction_order.element: Inventory items (health potions, Morph Ovum, etc.)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Discretionary use items; Morph Ovum converts enemies to chickens for tactical advantage
Puzzle solving; finding proper keys to unlock passage and access new areas
Environmental navigation; water currents push player character along specific paths
Spatial navigation upgrade; constrained look-up/down and flight capability
Significant encounter; guards progression to next major area
Major obstacle; gatekeeps final boss encounter
Narrative climax; final combat encounter before escape sequence

typical_relief_triggers: Inventory item discovery (health potions, Tome of Power)
Completion of key-gated areas granting passage
typical_tension_triggers: Trigger-activated enemy ambushes from concealed chambers
Environmental hazards (rushing water, demonic breeding grounds)
Narrow passages leading to Hell's Maw and later areas
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Level-based structure with escalating threat; early levels establish basic combat and key mechanics, mid-game introduces environmental complexity and boss encounters, late-game emphasizes relentless forward progression through increasingly dangerous territory (City of the Damned → Hell's Maw → D'Sparil's dome)

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Concealed chambers activated by triggers; interactive environments reward exploration and trigger discovery
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden chambers and resource caches accessed via environmental triggers; Doom-like key-gated progression conventions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to quarterstaff and basic ranged weapons; familiarization with key-finding and door-opening mechanics; low-to-moderate enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of Tome of Power secondary modes; environmental hazard navigation (rushing water); moderate-to-heavy enemy encounters; Iron Liches encounter signals difficulty spike
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained high-intensity combat; Maulotaur encounter; perilous journey to escape D'Sparil's dome; minimal safety windows
notable_spikes: Hell's Maw gateway guarded by Iron Liches
D'Sparil boss fight followed by escape sequence

notable_level_patterns.description: Major boss encounters (Iron Liches, Maulotaurs, D'Sparil) serve as definitive progression blockers between story regions, not just optional challenges
Levels require finding specific keys to progress; derived from Doom formula; encourages spatial memory and backtracking
Areas between major story regions (undead-infested location → Hell's Maw → D'Sparil's dome) feature distinct environmental themes and hazards
